nodes.label: mpower automatic power-profile daemon
nodes.rationale: Replaces the ppp-auto-profile timer/script; mpower IS the auto-profile mechanism. margo-specific (ConditionEnvironment=XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP=margo so it only starts under margo and never fights another compositor's tool over powerprofilesctl). Polls /sys + powerprofilesctl each tick (no D-Bus/UPower) to catch plug/unplug within one interval with zero async machinery.

nodes.label: mpower.toml config
nodes.rationale: Read fresh every tick so edits take effect next tick without restart; struct defined once in src/config.rs and reused by mshell-settings so the settings UI and daemon can never drift apart.

nodes.label: mpower auto-profile policy (hysteresis ladder)
nodes.rationale: On AC climb to performance on sustained high load (aggregate>=high_avg OR hottest core>=high_max), drop to balanced when everything is calm; needs high/low_streak consecutive samples + cooldown (anti-flap). On battery: balanced or power-saver below a charge %, never performance. Manual override backs off until the next AC transition.

hyperedges.label: m*-owned TOML config re-read on change, written by Settings
